languages.text: "Мне докладывали, что Гапраки уже должны были прибыть во дворец. Вероятно, что-то произошло по дороге, а быть может, благородный дом и вовсе решил, что защита Даргонуса не входит в его приоритеты".

traits.locale_text: "Мне докладывали, что Гапраки уже должны были прибыть во дворец. Вероятно, что-то произошло по дороге, а быть может, благородный дом и вовсе решил, что защита Даргонуса не входит в его приоритеты".

languages.text: "I received reports that the Gapraks ought to have arrived at the palace by now. Perhaps something happened on the way, or perhaps the noble house has decided that defending Dargonus is not one of its priorities."
languages.original_text: "Мне докладывали, что Гапраки уже должны были прибыть во дворец. Вероятно, что-то произошло по дороге, а быть может, благородный дом и вовсе решил, что защита Даргонуса не входит в его приоритеты".

traits.locale_text: "I received reports that the Gapraks ought to have arrived at the palace by now. Perhaps something happened on the way, or perhaps the noble house has decided that defending Dargonus is not one of its priorities."

"I received reports that the Gapraks ought to have arrived at the palace by now. Perhaps something happened on the way, or perhaps the noble house has decided that defending Dargonus is not one of its priorities."

"I received reports that the Gapraks ought to have arrived at the palace by now. Perhaps something happened on the way, or perhaps the noble house has decided that defending Dargonus is not one of its priorities."

languages.text: “我收到的报告说，贾帕克家的人早该抵达宫殿了。也许是路上出了什么变故，又或许这个贵族世家认为，守卫达戈努斯并不算什么要紧事。”
languages.original_text: "I received reports that the Gapraks ought to have arrived at the palace by now. Perhaps something happened on the way, or perhaps the noble house has decided that defending Dargonus is not one of its priorities."

traits.locale_text: “我收到的报告说，贾帕克家的人早该抵达宫殿了。也许是路上出了什么变故，又或许这个贵族世家认为，守卫达戈努斯并不算什么要紧事。”

languages.text: « D'après les rapports que j'ai reçus, leurs troupes auraient déjà dû arriver au palais. Il s'est peut-être passé quelque chose en chemin, à moins que la noble maison ait décidé que la défense de Dargonus ne faisait pas partie de ses priorités. »
languages.original_text: "I received reports that the Gapraks ought to have arrived at the palace by now. Perhaps something happened on the way, or perhaps the noble house has decided that defending Dargonus is not one of its priorities."

traits.locale_text: « D'après les rapports que j'ai reçus, leurs troupes auraient déjà dû arriver au palais. Il s'est peut-être passé quelque chose en chemin, à moins que la noble maison ait décidé que la défense de Dargonus ne faisait pas partie de ses priorités. »

languages.text: "Gaprakların şimdiye kadar saraya varmış olmaları gerektiğine dair raporlar aldım. Belki yolda bir şey oldu, belki de soylu hane... Dargonus'u savunmanın önceliklerinden biri olmadığına karar verdi."
languages.original_text: "I received reports that the Gapraks ought to have arrived at the palace by now. Perhaps something happened on the way, or perhaps the noble house has decided that defending Dargonus is not one of its priorities."

traits.locale_text: "Gaprakların şimdiye kadar saraya varmış olmaları gerektiğine dair raporlar aldım. Belki yolda bir şey oldu, belki de soylu hane... Dargonus'u savunmanın önceliklerinden biri olmadığına karar verdi."

languages.text: «He recibido informes según los cuales los Gaprak ya deberían haber llegado a palacio. Es posible que les haya pasado algo por el camino, o tal vez la noble casa haya decidido que la defensa de Dargonus no es prioritaria».
languages.original_text: "I received reports that the Gapraks ought to have arrived at the palace by now. Perhaps something happened on the way, or perhaps the noble house has decided that defending Dargonus is not one of its priorities."

traits.locale_text: «He recibido informes según los cuales los Gaprak ya deberían haber llegado a palacio. Es posible que les haya pasado algo por el camino, o tal vez la noble casa haya decidido que la defensa de Dargonus no es prioritaria».

languages.text: "Ich erhielt Berichte, wonach die Gaprak mittlerweile am Palast hätten eintreffen sollen. Vielleicht ist unterwegs etwas passiert oder das edle Haus hat beschlossen, dass die Verteidigung von Dagonus keine Priorität genießt."
languages.original_text: "I received reports that the Gapraks ought to have arrived at the palace by now. Perhaps something happened on the way, or perhaps the noble house has decided that defending Dargonus is not one of its priorities."

traits.locale_text: "Ich erhielt Berichte, wonach die Gaprak mittlerweile am Palast hätten eintreffen sollen. Vielleicht ist unterwegs etwas passiert oder das edle Haus hat beschlossen, dass die Verteidigung von Dagonus keine Priorität genießt."

languages.text: 「ギャプラクは今頃宮殿に到着しているはずだが、何か事情があったのかもしれない。あるいは、その貴族の家は、ダゴヌスを守ることを優先事項にしないことにしたのかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: "I received reports that the Gapraks ought to have arrived at the palace by now. Perhaps something happened on the way, or perhaps the noble house has decided that defending Dargonus is not one of its priorities."

traits.locale_text: 「ギャプラクは今頃宮殿に到着しているはずだが、何か事情があったのかもしれない。あるいは、その貴族の家は、ダゴヌスを守ることを優先事項にしないことにしたのかもしれない。」
